parts.turret_traverse_pivot: separate turret pivot at ring center
parts.cannon_elevation_pivot: separate barrel pitch pivot at mantlet
parts.tread_belt_asset: one reusable low-poly belt mesh/material instanced left and right
parts.gear_assets: individual low-poly cylinders, separate from belt asset, animated independently

acceptance: This seed is structurally animatable but visually provisional. Meshy may be used later for surface/texturing only if this part contract survives inspection.
